name: Basic Biscotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Spread almonds on a baking sheet and toast them in the oven until lightly golden. Let cool.
3. Coarsely chop half of the toasted nuts.
4. Butter two large baking sheets.
5. In a bowl, mix flour, sugar, salt, and baking soda.
6. Beat eggs into the dry ingredients, then add the whole and chopped nuts.
7. Mix to form a firm dough. Knead briefly.
8. Divide the dough into four equal pieces.
9. On a floured surface, roll each piece into a cylinder that is 15 inches long and about 1 1/2 inches in diameter.
10. Place two rolls on separate baking sheets, well spaced.
11. Bake for 15 to 20 minutes, or until lightly browned and firm to the touch.
12. Using a spatula, transfer the rolls to a cutting board and slice each into diagonals about 1/2-inch thick.
13. Set wire racks over the baking sheets and place the biscotti on them.
14. Return the biscuits to the oven for an additional 20 to 30 minutes, or until very firm and crisp.
15. Cool on the racks before serving.
